closed_reason: Gate 2 publish completed: PR #6 merged into origin/main with --merge while preserving commit 1 and commit 2 ancestry; Gate 3 cleanup deferred
task_summary: Gate 2 publish completed for the frozen A4 closeout branch. Pre-push invariants passed, the freeze branch was pushed, PR #6 was opened with commit provenance, mergeability was repaired by merge commit 506411b on the freeze branch, and PR #6 merged as 28ce302 with commit 1 and commit 2 preserved in origin/main.

contract_checkpoints.C1: Auth probe, session bootstrap, and root/session state mirroring completed without rewriting commit 1 or commit 2.
contract_checkpoints.C2: Pre-push provenance invariants matched the handoff exactly: branch/log order, artifact byte identity, 5-anchor commit 1, 11-file commit 2, and commit 1 BOM.
contract_checkpoints.C3: The freeze branch was pushed and PR #6 was opened with the required provenance body while preserving the cited commit graph.
contract_checkpoints.C4: PR #6 merged with the merge strategy after a branch-local mergeability fix 506411b; origin/main now contains both commit 1 and commit 2.
contract_checkpoints.C5: turn-01.yaml, BOM summaries, converged state, and both validators finished PASS; Gate 3 cleanup is deferred.

decisions: Opened session 2026-04-15-a4-publish as a dedicated Gate 2 publish slice after Gate 1 ACK converged.
Recorded the start-of-turn claude auth 401 plus setup-token timeout, but used the still-valid GitHub CLI auth path for publish execution.
Verified all pre-push provenance invariants before the first remote mutation and confirmed commit 1 BOM via bash od output.

Pushed the freeze branch at c04bfce, created PR #6 with the required provenance narrative, then repaired mergeability by merging origin/main into the freeze branch as 506411b in a disposable clean clone.
Merged PR #6 with the merge strategy only. origin/main tip is now 28ce302 and contains both 0a8bc65 and c04bfce.
Closed the publish session locally with turn-01.yaml, summary.md, named summary, mirrored converged state, and validator passes.
meta_improvements: The mergeability fix kept the critical provenance commits intact by using a branch-local merge commit rather than any history rewrite.
The required PR body now captures not only commit 1 provenance but also the hygiene-session rationale and the permanent no-squash/no-rebase rule.
Gate 3 cleanup is isolated cleanly from Gate 2 publish so remote-branch deletion and dirty-worktree triage cannot accidentally perturb the published provenance graph.
